dna.federation.views.entity.title: Logical View
dna.federation.views.entity.description: Logical view definition that encapsulates cross-source query semantics.
dna.federation.views.description.schemaN: Name of the owning logical schema
dna.federation.views.description.schemaC: Code of the owning logical schema
dna.federation.views.title.name: View Name
dna.federation.views.description.name: Display name of the logical view
dna.federation.views.description.code: Unique business code of the logical view
dna.federation.views.description.definit: Read-only SQL definition of the logical view
dna.federation.views.description.enabled: Whether the logical view can be used by the SQL console and federation queries
dna.federation.views.page.alert.noSchema: No logical schemas are available yet
Create a logical schema first, then come back to configure logical views.
